elections.note: Pre-VCA, pre-e-pollbook polling-place county. Certified final 330,817 (VBM 219,189 + Election Day 111,628; 48.39% of registered) from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County. Election-night first-report count not sourceable here (Wayback blocked; live results overwritten).

Pre-e-pollbook (still polling-place precincts). Certified final 575,711 (VBM 372,597 + Election Day 203,114; 74.49% of registered) from CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County. Election-night first-report count not sourceable here (Wayback blocked).

First general run under the Voter's Choice Act vote-center model with electronic pollbooks (deployed starting June 2018 primary). PROXY: 263,243 = ballots RECEIVED as of the Monday before Election Day (county via CapRadio live blog) -- the pre-Election-Day VBM/vote-center pool that feeds the ~8:15 p.m. first report; the actual reported first-tranche count was not separately sourced, so this proxy may differ from the literal first report. Certified final 522,652 (68.23% of registered, all-time high midterm turnout). pct = 263,243/522,652.

PROXY (end-of-night, not the 8:15 p.m. first tranche): county spokesperson Janna Haynes said ~342,000 ballots had been tallied 'as of 2 a.m. Wednesday' with an estimated ~360,000 remaining (342k+360k ~= the 729,569 final). This running total INCLUDES the first report plus the through-the-night vote-center updates, so it overstates the 8:15 p.m. first-report share. Certified final 729,569 (82.51% of registered). pct = 342,000/729,569.

VCA vote-center / e-pollbook county. Certified final 484,315 (55.98% of registered). Election-night first-report count not sourceable here; only late figures available (e.g., ~89,000 unprocessed in Sacramento County as of Nov 26 per SoS statewide report).

VCA vote-center / e-pollbook county. Certified final 668,416 (75.12% of registered). First report came shortly after 8 p.m. (VBM + vote-center ballots processed through the day before Election Day), but the reported first-tranche countywide ballot total is not sourceable here (Wayback blocked; results pages JS-rendered/overwritten).
